message:
✨ Add 30-minute caching for GitHub Activity card

- Cache GitHub API responses in localStorage for 30 minutes
- Fall back to stale cache when API requests fail (rate limit)
- Show "Using cached data" warning when serving stale data
- Reduces API calls significantly for repos that don't change often
- Manual refresh bypasses cache to get fresh data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
